name: Zolai Phrasebook Builder
goal: Extract and categorize parallel phrases from corpus into domain-specific phrasebooks
rules: Categories: greetings, food, travel, family, numbers, time, religion, health, work
Each entry must have: zo (Zolai), en (English), category, cefr_level
Validate ZVS compliance before writing output

tools.name: search_parallel
tools.description: Search parallel corpus for phrases by category

tools.name: validate_grammar
tools.description: Validate ZVS compliance of extracted phrases
